extracted.title: TPGS Pipeline Conditions for 3/10/2026 -- INTRADAY
extracted.description:
Due to intraday nomination changes for Gas Day March 10, 2026, the following restrictions will be in place on the Tres Palacios Gas Storage, LLC (TPGS) system for Gas Day March 10, 2026:

Tres Palacios has scheduled and sealed injection nominations including IWS activity. No increases in injections or IWS activity will be accepted.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
affectedLocations: Tres Palacios Gas Storage, LLC (TPGS) system
